trust.reviewsSubline: reviews across Google Maps, IndiaMART & more

attributionEn: Summaries shown when available are from Google Maps and may be abbreviated. See Google for full text and policies.

reviews.author: Khushboo Agnani
reviews.text: Pankaj Electronics is truly outstanding! ✨ Their customer service is exceptional, and they genuinely value their customers. I'm so pleased with my recent purchase and the overall experience. Highly recommend them! 👍😊

reviews.author: Surjeet Rajpoot
reviews.text: Very good products and great services best staff and behavior

reviews.author: Sapna Ahirwar
reviews.text: Very polite behaviour and good finance facility I am surprised with offers

reviews.author: Heer Yadav
reviews.text: Nice person and good behaviour of all staff less price and great product

reviews.author: Satyam Singh thakur
reviews.text: Nice 👍 im happy with shopping for mobile and other products bhopal best shop free gift 🎁 every item

reviews.author: ravi gehlod
reviews.text: Veri nice product and best option and gift Thank you bheya

reviews.author: Mahendra Dhangar
reviews.text: Best finance services and good behaviour at all very sensible person

reviews.author: rakesh kumar
reviews.text: Best prices and best experience nice staff and owner behaviour
